'''Bakk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bloxian]] and the brother of [[Chokk (Bloxian)|Chokk]]. They worked as [[Linkaas]]' goons. Considered not the brightest sentients in the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], they were given jobs that required a lot of muscle but no thinking.

{{Char-stub}}
